prompt: Generate a pie chart showing market share of two shampoo brands: Dove (65%) and Head & Shoulders (35%). Use Image 1 and Image 2 as references and style each slice using the product’s packaging colors.
prompt_refined: Generate a pie chart displaying the market share of two shampoo brands: Dove (65%) and Head & Shoulders (35%). The 65% slice representing Dove should incorporate the white, gold, and bronze colors from the packaging shown in Image 1. The 35% slice representing Head & Shoulders should utilize the distinct blue and white colors from the packaging shown in Image 2.
objects: White, gold, and bronze colors on the 65% slice
Blue and white colors on the 35% slice
